519.bio: According to some scholars, He grew up as a young man and died as martyred in battle of Yarmouk.

530.bio: He was Qadhi in medinah during Ameer Mau'wiyah khilafat.

531.full_name: Rabi'ah ibn Nawfal ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quassy b. Kilab

532.full_name: Sa'eed ibn Nawfal ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Kilab b. Murrah
532.bio: According to some he was Sa'eed ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib (Prophet's cousin)

533.full_name: al-Mughira ibn Nawfal ibn al-Harith ibn 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Quasyy b. Kilab

534.short_name: Umm Khultum bint Fadl ibn al-'Abbas

534.arabic: أم كلثوم بنت الفضل بن العباس

535.full_name: Rayta bint Abī Tālib b. 'Abd al-Muttalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
535.bio: Cousin of Muhammad(ﷺ) and Sister of Ali.

536.full_name: Mughith, the husband of Barira, the client of Abi Ahmed bin Jahsh al-Asadi

537.full_name: Khalida bint Abi Lahab ibn 'Abd al-Muṭṭalib b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah

538.arabic: عزة بنت أبي لهب بن عبد المطلب الهاشمية

545.full_name: Umm 'Abdullah bin 'Aidy b. Khuwaylid bin Asad bin 'Abdul-'Uzza bin Qua'syy bin Kilab b. Murrah

548.arabic: فاطمة بنت حمزة بن عبد المطلب
548.bio: There is some disagreement over the actual name.

549.bio: There is some disagreement over the actual name.

553.full_name: Mansoor ibn 'Umair b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab

554.full_name: Zaynab bint Mus'ab ibn 'Umair b. Hashim b. 'Abd Manaf b. 'Abd al-Dar b. Qusayy b. Kilab

555.full_name: al-walid bin 'Uqba ibn Abi Mu'ayt bin Abu 'Amr bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
555.arabic: الوليد بن عقبة بن أبي معيط
555.bio: He was governor of Kufa for 'Uthman.

556.full_name: 'Ammarah bin 'Uqba ibn Abi Mu'ayt bin Abu 'Amr bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
556.arabic: عمارة بن عقبة بن أبي معيط

558.full_name: Umm Hakim  bint 'Uqba ibn Abi Mu'ayt bin Abu 'Amr bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
558.arabic: أم حكيم بنت عقبة بن أبي معيط

559.full_name: Hind  bint 'Uqba ibn Abi Mu'ayt bin Abu 'Amr bin Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf
559.arabic: هند بنت عقبة بن أبي معيط

560.full_name: 'Abdur Rahman ibn 'Umar bin Al-Khattab b. Nufayl b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Riyah b. 'Abdullah b. Qurt
560.arabic: عبد الرحمن الأكبر بن عمر بن الخطاب

561.full_name: 'Ubaidallah ibn 'Umar bin Al-Khattab b. Nufayl b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Riyah b. 'Abdullah b. Qurt b. Raza
561.arabic: عبيد الله بن عمر بن الخطاب
561.bio: He was killed in the battle of As-siffin against 'Ali (RA).

562.full_name: Zayd ibn 'Umar bin Al-Khattab b. Nufayl b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Riyah b. 'Abdullah b. Qurt b. Raza

563.full_name: 'Asim ibn 'Umar bin Al-Khattab b. Nufayl b. 'Abdul-'Uzza b. Riyah b. 'Abdullah b. Qurt b. Raza
563.bio: Grand father of Umayyad Khalif 'Umar bin 'Abdul 'Aziz.

564.short_name: Jamila bint Thabit ibn Abi al-Aflah
564.full_name: Jamila bint Thabit ibn Abi al-Aflah (Qays) bin 'Asima b. Malik b. Umayya b. Dubaya' b. Zayd
564.arabic: جميلة بنت ثابت بن أبي الأقلح

567.full_name: Zayd bin 'Amr bin Nufayl b. 'Abd al-Uzza b. Riyah b. 'Abdullah b. Qurt b. Razah b. 'Adi b. Ka'b
567.arabic: زيد بن عمرو بن نفيل العدوي
567.bio:
Before Islam, Zayd was a hanif, the monotheistic tradition of Abraham, and hence never worshipped idols and used to mock idol worshipers of Quraish.
He died before the prophet hood of Muhammad (ﷺ). But a/c to a tradition, he will be raised on the day of judgment as a separate Ummah.

568.full_name: Fatima bint Ba'aja bin Umayyah bin Khuwailid of B.Khuza'a

570.full_name: Amnah bint Affan b. Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
570.arabic: آمنة بنت عفان بن أبي العاص

571.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Uthman b. 'Affan b. Abi al-'As b. Umayya b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy
571.arabic: عبد الله بن عثمان بن عفان

572.full_name: Ramlah bint Shayba bin Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
572.arabic: رملة بنت شيبة بن ربيعة بن عبد شمس
572.mother_name: Umm Sharak bint Waqdan of B. 'Amir b. Lu'ayy
572.bio: Her father was killed in the battle of Badr as disbeliever.

573.full_name: Umm 'Amr bint Jundub bin 'Amr bin Humamah (Azd branch of Daus tribe)
573.arabic: أم عمرو بنت جندب بن عمرو

574.full_name: Fatima bint al-Walid b. 'Abd Shams b. al-Mughirah b. 'Abdullah b. 'Umar b. Makhzum

575.full_name: Na'ilah bint Al-Furafisah bin al-Ahwas b. 'Amr b. Tha'lbah b. al-Harith from Kalb bin Wabarah

576.full_name: Fakhitah bint Ghazwan b. jabir b. Wahb b. Nusyab b. Malik b. al-Harith b. Maazin b. Mansur

577.full_name: Muhammad ibn Talha b. 'Ubaidullah b. 'Uthman b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b
577.arabic: محمد بن طلحة بن عبيد الله القرشي التيمي

578.full_name: 'Imran ibn Talha b. 'Ubaidullah b. 'Uthman b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b
578.arabic: عمران بن طلحة بن عبيد الله التيمي

579.full_name: Musa ibn Talha b. 'Ubaidullah b. 'Uthman b. 'Amr b. Ka'b b. Sa'd b. Taym b. Murrah b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy
579.arabic: موسى بن طلحة بن عبيد الله التيمى

580.full_name: Khawla bint al-Qa'Qa' bin Ma'bad b. Zurarah b. 'Adas b. Zayd b. 'Abdullah b. Daram al-Tamimi

581.full_name: Umm Aban bint 'Utba b. Rabi'a b. 'Abd Shams b. 'Abd Manaf b. Qusayy b. Kilab b. Murrah
581.arabic: أم أبان بنت عتبة بن ربيعة بنت عبد شمس

582.full_name: Suada bint 'Auf bin Kharija b. Sinan b. Abi Haritha al-Murriya
582.bio: سعدى بنت عوف بن خارجة بن سنان بن أبي حارثة المرية

583.full_name: al-Jarba' bint Qasama b. Qays b. 'Ubayd b. Tarif b. Malik b. Jad'an b. Dhal b. Ruman ... al-Tayyi'

584.full_name: Ibrahim bin 'Abdur Rahman b. 'Awf b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
584.arabic: إبراهيم بن عبد الرحمن بن عوف الزهرى
584.spouses: Umm Khultum bint Sa'd bin Abi Waqqas,Others

585.full_name: as-Sa'bah bint 'Abdullah bin 'Imaad bin Akbar b. Rabiia' b. Malik b. 'Uwaif Al-Hadrami
585.father_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Imaad bin Akbar b. Rabiia' b. Malik
585.mother_name: Hatika bint Wahb bin 'Abd b. Quassy b. Kilab
585.spouses: 'Ubaidullah ibn 'Uthman bin 'Amr of Taym bin Murrah

586.full_name: al-'Ala',  'Abdullah bin 'Imaad bin Akbar b. Rabia' b. Malik b. 'Uwaif al-Hadrami
586.father_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Imaad bin Akbar b. Rabiia' b. Malik
586.mother_name: Hatika bint Wahb bin 'Abd b. Quassy b. Kilab
586.bio: He was sent by Prophet(ﷺ) to the King of Bahrain and he accepted Islam.

587.full_name: Khayra bint Qays bin Khalid b. Wahb b. Tha'laba b. Wa'il b. 'Amr  b. Shiban b. Muharib b. Fihr
587.father_name: Qays bin Khalid Akbar bin Wahb

588.full_name: Muhammad bin 'Abdur-Rahman bin 'Awf b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah
588.arabic: محمد بن عبد الرحمن بن عوف الزهرى

589.full_name: al-Shifa' bint 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b b. Lu'ayy b. Ghalib
589.arabic: الشفاء بنت عوف بن عبد بن الحارث
589.mother_name: Salma bint 'Amir bin Bayada of Khuza'a

590.full_name: 'Atika bint 'Awf b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b

591.full_name: al-Shifa' bint 'Awf b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b
591.arabic: الشفاء بنت عوف بن عبد عوف

592.full_name: 'Abdullah bin 'Awf b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b

593.full_name: Tumadir bint al-Asbagh bin 'Amr b. Tha'laba b. Hadar b. Damdam b. 'Adi b. Janab b. Habal of Kalb
593.bio: Both husbands divorced her (Al-Zubayr after only 7 days or so). She was the first woman from her tribe to marry in Quraish.

594.full_name: Halah bint 'Awf b. 'Abd 'Awf b. 'Abd b. al-Harith b. Zuhrah b. Kilab b. Murrah b. Ka'b

595.arabic: سهلة بنت عاصم بن عدي الأنصارية

596.short_name: Umm Hakim bint Qariz bin Khalid
596.full_name: Umm Hakim bint Qariz bin Khalid b. 'Ubaid b. Suwayd
596.arabic: أم حكيم بنت قارظ بن خالد

597.short_name: Ishaq bin Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas

597.arabic: إسحاق بن سعد بن أبي وقاص
597.mother_name: bint Shihab b. 'Abdullah of B. Zuhrah

598.full_name: 'Umar bin Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas (Malik) bin Uhaib bin 'Abd Manaf bin Zuhrah bin Kilab bin Murrah
598.arabic: عمر بن سعد بن أبي وقاص
598.mother_name: Maria bint Qays b. Ma'di Kurb of Kinda
598.bio: He was most likely a Tabi'.

599.full_name: Yazid ibn 'Abdullah ibn al-Jarrah b. Hilal b. Uhaib b. Dabbah b. Al-Harith b. Fihr b. Malik
599.arabic: يزيد بن عبد الله بن الجراح
